---
title: "PhD Defense Dinner"
format:
  pjk_theme-html:
    toc: false
    navbar: false
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <script data-goatcounter="https://pjkreutzer.goatcounter.com/count"
          async src="//gc.zgo.at/count.js"></script>
          <style>
            /* Confetti */
            .confetti-container {
              position: fixed;
              top: 0;
              left: 0;
              width: 100%;
              height: 100%;
              pointer-events: none;
              z-index: 9999;
              overflow: hidden;
            }

            .confetti {
              position: absolute;
              top: -10px;
              width: 10px;
              height: 10px;
              opacity: 0;
              animation: confetti-fall 4s ease-in forwards;
            }

            .confetti:nth-child(odd) { border-radius: 50%; }
            .confetti:nth-child(3n) { width: 8px; height: 14px; border-radius: 2px; }
            .confetti:nth-child(5n) { width: 6px; height: 6px; }

            @keyframes confetti-fall {
              0%   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg) scale(1); }
              100% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(100vh) rotate(720deg) scale(0.5); }
            }

            .confetti:nth-child(1)  { left:  3%; animation-delay: 0.0s; animation-duration: 3.5s; background: hsl(219, 80%, 68%); }
            .confetti:nth-child(2)  { left:  8%; animation-delay: 0.2s; animation-duration: 4.0s; background: hsl(36, 54%, 51%); }
            .confetti:nth-child(3)  { left: 13%; animation-delay: 0.1s; animation-duration: 3.8s; background: hsl(227, 71%, 55%); }
            .confetti:nth-child(4)  { left: 18%; animation-delay: 0.4s; animation-duration: 4.2s; background: hsl(152, 37%, 46%); }
            .confetti:nth-child(5)  { left: 23%; animation-delay: 0.3s; animation-duration: 3.6s; background: hsl(4, 90%, 58%); }
            .confetti:nth-child(6)  { left: 28%; animation-delay: 0.5s; animation-duration: 4.1s; background: hsl(219, 80%, 68%); }
            .confetti:nth-child(7)  { left: 33%; animation-delay: 0.1s; animation-duration: 3.9s; background: hsl(36, 54%, 51%); }
            .confetti:nth-child(8)  { left: 38%; animation-delay: 0.6s; animation-duration: 3.7s; background: hsl(231, 65%, 48%); }
            .confetti:nth-child(9)  { left: 43%; animation-delay: 0.2s; animation-duration: 4.3s; background: hsl(152, 37%, 46%); }
            .confetti:nth-child(10) { left: 48%; animation-delay: 0.4s; animation-duration: 3.5s; background: hsl(4, 90%, 58%); }
            .confetti:nth-child(11) { left: 53%; animation-delay: 0.3s; animation-duration: 4.0s; background: hsl(219, 80%, 68%); }
            .confetti:nth-child(12) { left: 58%; animation-delay: 0.7s; animation-duration: 3.8s; background: hsl(227, 71%, 55%); }
            .confetti:nth-child(13) { left: 63%; animation-delay: 0.1s; animation-duration: 4.1s; background: hsl(36, 54%, 51%); }
            .confetti:nth-child(14) { left: 68%; animation-delay: 0.5s; animation-duration: 3.6s; background: hsl(152, 37%, 46%); }
            .confetti:nth-child(15) { left: 73%; animation-delay: 0.2s; animation-duration: 4.2s; background: hsl(4, 90%, 58%); }
            .confetti:nth-child(16) { left: 78%; animation-delay: 0.6s; animation-duration: 3.9s; background: hsl(231, 65%, 48%); }
            .confetti:nth-child(17) { left: 83%; animation-delay: 0.3s; animation-duration: 3.7s; background: hsl(219, 80%, 68%); }
            .confetti:nth-child(18) { left: 88%; animation-delay: 0.8s; animation-duration: 4.0s; background: hsl(36, 54%, 51%); }
            .confetti:nth-child(19) { left: 93%; animation-delay: 0.1s; animation-duration: 4.3s; background: hsl(227, 71%, 55%); }
            .confetti:nth-child(20) { left: 97%; animation-delay: 0.4s; animation-duration: 3.5s; background: hsl(152, 37%, 46%); }

            /* Page layout */
            .invite-hero {
              text-align: center;
              padding: 3rem 1rem 2rem;
            }

            .invite-hero h1 {
              font-size: 2.5rem;
              font-weight: 700;
              margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
              border-bottom: none;
            }

            .invite-hero .subtitle {
              font-size: 1.3rem;
              color: hsl(219, 80%, 68%);
              font-weight: 500;
              margin-bottom: 2rem;
            }

            .details-grid {
              display: grid;
              grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
              gap: 1.5rem;
              max-width: 700px;
              margin: 0 auto 3rem;
              text-align: center;
            }

            .detail-card {
              background: hsl(219, 88%, 97%);
              border-radius: 0.5rem;
              padding: 1.5rem 1rem;
              border: 1px solid hsl(221, 78%, 93%);
            }

            .detail-card .label {
              font-weight: 600;
              font-size: 0.8rem;
              text-transform: uppercase;
              letter-spacing: 0.05em;
              color: hsl(227, 71%, 55%);
              margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
            }

            .detail-card .value {
              font-size: 1.1rem;
              color: hsl(232, 50%, 21%);
              font-weight: 500;
            }

            .detail-card .value a {
              color: hsl(219, 80%, 68%);
            }

            .rsvp-section {
              max-width: 700px;
              margin: 0 auto;
              text-align: center;
            }

            .rsvp-section h2 {
              display: block;
              border-bottom: none;
              margin-top: 1rem;
            }

            .rsvp-deadline {
              margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            }

            .rsvp-deadline .accent {
              color: hsl(219, 80%, 68%);
              font-weight: 400;
            }

            .rsvp-form-container {
              border: 1px solid hsl(221, 78%, 93%);
              border-radius: 0.5rem;
              overflow: hidden;
              margin-bottom: 3rem;
            }
          </style>
---

::: {.confetti-container}
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
:::

::: {.invite-hero}

# Let's Celebrate!

::: {.subtitle}
Join me for dinner after my PhD defense
:::

:::

::: {.details-grid}

::: {.detail-card}
::: {.label}
Date
:::
::: {.value}
April 27, 2026
:::
:::

::: {.detail-card}
::: {.label}
Time
:::
::: {.value}
18:30 -- 21:00
:::
:::

::: {.detail-card}
::: {.label}
Location
:::
::: {.value}
[Restaurang Mygel](https://maps.google.com/?q=Restaurang+Mygel+Lodgatan+3b+Malmö){target="_blank"}<br>Lodgatan 3b, Malmö
:::
:::

:::

::: {.rsvp-section}

## RSVP

::: {.rsvp-deadline}
Please respond by April 20, 2026 and swish the suggested contribution of 400SEK for adults and 100SEK for children to [004673 466 6776]{.accent}. Please reach out if you would like to use another transfer than swish.
:::

::: {.rsvp-form-container}
<iframe data-tally-src="https://tally.so/embed/EkLZdq?hideTitle=1&transparentBackground=1&dynamicHeight=1" loading="lazy" width="100%" height="300" frameborder="0" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0" title="RSVP"></iframe>
<script>var d=document,w="https://tally.so/widgets/embed.js",v=function(){"undefined"!=typeof Tally?Tally.loadEmbeds():d.querySelectorAll("iframe[data-tally-src]:not([src])").forEach((function(e){e.src=e.dataset.tallySrc}))};if("undefined"!=typeof Tally)v();else if(d.querySelector('script[src="'+w+'"]')==null){var s=d.createElement("script");s.src=w;s.onload=v;s.onerror=v;d.body.appendChild(s)}</script>
:::

:::
